entries.title: IOC Pivot Workflow
entries.summary: Analyst workflow for pivoting between hashes, domains, and IP indicators during active investigations.
recommended_steps: Normalize IOC context from SIEM alert metadata.
Execute local pivot chain across case artifacts.
Publish enriched indicator package to SOC case timeline.

entries.title: Alert Triage Shortcut Pack
entries.summary: Reduces analyst friction with predefined shortcuts for repetitive triage and validation checks.
recommended_steps: Apply one-click context enrichment against local threat intel cache.
Map detection metadata to ATT&CK tactic and technique.
Escalate high-confidence incidents to containment queue.
